entries.title: Ahead of its IPO, Anthropic’s Daniela Amodei shrugs off doubts about AI’s returns
entries.description: Anthropic has been growing at a breakneck pace. The company announced that annualized revenue crossed $47 billion in May, up dramatically from roughly $9 billion at the end of 2025. That trajectory fa

entries.title: Airbnb’s Brian Chesky plans to launch a new AI lab
entries.description: The Airbnb CEO said last year it hasn't struck an LLM partnership because existing products weren't quite ready.

entries.title: Defense tech, AI, and fundraising take center stage at StrictlyVC Los Angeles on June 18

entries.title: Meta steals a tactic from Tesla and builds data centers in tents
entries.description: Meta may have found one way to slash its massive data center bill: tents.

entries.title: Apple approves Poke as the first AI agent on its Messages for Business platform
entries.description: Poke, the startup that lets people use AI agents through simple text messages, has become the first AI agent approved for Apple’s Messages for Business platform.

entries.title: Is this the dawn of the Tokenpocalypse?
entries.description: We're likely to see more price increases as the big AI companies plan to go public.

entries.title: Notion restores access to Anthropic after service disruption
entries.description: Notion's head of product said he was "astonished" at “the amount of people RT-ing this."

entries.title: OpenAI is still working on that ‘super app’
entries.description: "Chat is dead" — at least, according to a senior OpenAI employee.

entries.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
entries.description: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.

entries.title: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
entries.description: Krishnan is reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.

entries.title: The Trump administration might take an equity stake in OpenAI
entries.description: President Donald Trump said he's discussing deals "where the American people can benefit from the success of AI."

entries.title: Amazon now lets you design custom merch using AI
entries.description: A new feature in the Amazon Shopping app allows users to generate designs with Alexa, then print them on products like T-shirts, hoodies, and tumblers.
